title: Code is a liability
summary: There have been a few posts going around recently floating the idea that all code is tech debt[^1], all code is legacy, whatever. Naturally there are a selection of posts that refute this and provide their own explanation, like this one called Code is Not Technical Debt [^2]. I'd
content: There have been a few posts going around recently floating the idea that all code is tech debt[^1], all code is legacy, whatever. Naturally there are a selection of posts that refute this and provide their own explanation, like this one called Code is Not Technical Debt [^2]. I'd
